description: UNDERTALE II: Revenge of the Robots is the new awesome sequel to UNDERTALE everyone has been talking about for the past few decades. It's totally not a FANGAME OR ANYTHING.

v0.1.description:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/studkid/Undertale2-AP/blob/main/World/docs/setup_en.md)
[Game Page](https://github.com/studkid/Undertale2-AP/blob/main/World/docs/en_Undertale%202.md)

This is an alpha build and likely will have issues or logic errors.  Using Universal Tracker is recommended.

**Note: Hard Mode and the Ignoramus route is not currently supported.  Some locations will not be accessible, especially for the latter route**

# Known Issues
- Generation will fail if goal is set to `marisa_kirisame` or `true_ending` while `shuffle_fish_mission` is false and `aquariumsanity` is true
- `all_completion_bonus` goal sometimes gens unbeatable seeds.
- If you game over/return to the main menu, you will need to do a full game restart to be able to reconnect
- If the room port ever changes, you will need to restart your save file to continue play (unless you know your way around a hex editor to edit the port in the save file yourself)
v0.1.title: v0.1 Alpha

v0.2.description:
# New Features
- [APWorld + Client] Added `Early Beach` setting.
    - Allows you to start with access to honeycomb beach from the start, or alternatively have it locked behind an item.
    - If item mode is selected, you'll still unlock the beach warp normally after the prison.
    - You will be blocked from proceeding past Jinx & Buggy until the prison is complete (to prevent heavy sequence breaking)
- [APWorld + Client] Added `Starting Character` setting.
    - Note: this setting is still fairly experimental and will make some events visually play wrong.
- [APWorld + Client] Added `Levelsanity` setting.
    - Turns level ups per party member into a location.  Additionally will remove skill learn sets that'll need to be received as an item instead.
- [APWorld + Client] The Wise Dummy no longer teaches Rezz.  This is now a location check and you'll instead get Rezz from an item.

# QoL Changes
- [Client] Holding shift will allow you to skip dialogue.
    - This is done via yanfly's message system script which may introduce some other unwanted changes to textboxes.  Please report any possible inconsistencies with it.
- [APWorld] UT now has a map tracker for checks
    - Currently only Ruins and Archives have their trackers done, currently no autotab support yet.

# Misc Changes
- [APWorld] Changes `Require Nazrin` option name to `Require Negotiation` now with it potentially requiring Frisk and Mouse in your Pocket
- [APWorld] `Progressive Monk Key` is now renamed to `Progressive Lokey Key`.  Progressive Monk Key is no longer converted to a progressive key with it set to true.
- [APWorld] `Frisk` is now required to enter the fishing area and to activate the elevator to Marisa.
- [APWorld] Spark and The Ra Men now expect you to have the ability to use manzai bros before being in logic.
    - Mostly a temporary change until I come up with a better set of requirements for this fight.

# Bug Fixes
- [APWorld] Aquariumsanity now gens properly with fishing missions disabled.
- [APWorld] The `Aquarium Key` is now logically required to enter the Aquarium.
- [APWorld] `Beach - Melonbread Cove Dig Spot Island` now expects you to fish up a rubber duckie for the woshua.
- [APWorld] `Hotden Mystery Shop` now expects the lullaby to be active.
- [APWorld] Fishing missions should now have correct logic
- [Client] Completion Bonus fishing mission check now uses the separate ap fishing mission variable so `progressive fishing spot` will no longer contribute to this goal.
- [Client] Fixed the `Fishing Guide` from not being received properly.
v0.2.title: v0.2

v0.2.1.description:
# Fixes
- [Client] Random client fixes that I forgot to document all of lol
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1

v0.2.2.description:
# Changes
- [APWorld] Hatsune Miku now requires 4 party members to be in logic.
- [APWorld] Professor Master Cirno now requires 2 party members to be in logic (down from 4).

# Bug Fixes
- [APWorld] Fixed Early Beach Access logic not expecting the `Honeycomb Beach Access` item to reach.
- [Client] Replaced Truck Freak's truck's tires to ones that won't go flat upon entering the beach for the first time, thus potentially trapping you there.
- [Client] `Ruins - Knockdown Peatroopers` and `Beach - The Ra Men Drop` now properly send their respective checks.
- [Client] *Actually* fixed the game from crashing on startup.
- [Client] Fixed Nazrin being unable to use her toolcrafting tools when `levelsanity` is enabled.
v0.2.2.title: v0.2.2

v0.2.3.description:
# Logic Changes
- [APWorld + Client] Nicky Coinflip Prison shop checks now moved to be available from the beginning of the prison, instead of needing access to the waiting room.
    - Buying these checks from the beach instead is still considered OoL

# Bug Fixes
- [Client] Sans' `Backpat` skill now is properly received
- [Client]  `Beach - Piss and Shit FM HQ` now sends the proper location
- [Client] Warping to the prison post Cirno now no longer removes the party.  Warping from prison no longer removes Frisk or Monk Key permanently.
- [APWorld] Actually fix honeycomb beach access item for real this time
- [APWorld] Heaven fish spot donations now won't appear on Marisa Kirisame goal.
v0.2.3.title: v0.2.3

v0.2.4.description:
# Bug Fixes
- [APWorld] Fixed game not generating if cardsanity is disabled
- [APWorld] Levelsanity now properly removed if disabled
v0.2.4.title: v0.2.4

v0.2.5.description:

- [Client] Homer Guards and Prison Ticks now have negotiation dialog

# Bugfixes
- [Client] Melonbread Cove Dig Spots 1 and 2 now properly send their locations
- [Client] Fixed certain aquarium fish being able to be donated repeatedly

No apworld update since 0.2.4
v0.2.5.title: v0.2.5

v0.2.6.description:

- [APWorld] Fixed aquariumsanity logic
v0.2.6.title: v0.2.6
